data.title: 国际服爱丽丝CG和谐（附金用河道歉信）

data.body:
Here is a letter from PD Kim Yong-ha regarding the revision of the Aris scenario production.

We will continue to do our best to provide satisfying service to every Sensei.
![aq8lTQWSa6fHoP4Exy2MQasOtZnJoVEN.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/aq8lTQWSa6fHoP4Exy2MQasOtZnJoVEN.jpg)
